news.summary: Shilling in crypto involves promoting a cryptocurrency or token with exaggerated claims to inflate its price, often leading to investors losing money. Common tactics include overhyping promises, having anonymous or suspicious teams, influencer spam, lacking a real product or roadmap, and using pressure tactics to create fear of missing out. Red flags to look out for include promises of guaranteed returns, anonymous team members, sudden influencer endorsements without disclosures, missing product implementations, and urgency in purchasing. Shilling is not only unethical but also illegal, with regulators cracking down on influencers and individuals who engage in fraudulent behavior. Recent cases include fines for influencers like Kim Kardashian, legal actions against promoters like BitBoy for endorsing scam tokens, and indictments for individuals running fraudulent schemes. Shillers risk facing fines, lawsuits, or criminal charges for misleading investors. The rise in crypto scams has prompted regulators to enforce stricter regulations, leading to consequences for those involved in shilling activities.
news.headline: Avoid shilling traps in crypto! Look out for these red flags: hype, anonymity, influencer spam, no product, pressure tactics.

news.summary: Held in Jeddah, Saudi Arabia, the Kingdom Photography Award showcases the transition from tradition to modernity in the country. Recognizing the importance of storytelling through visuals, the award celebrates Saudi narratives captured through photography. The competition has attracted over 500 participants, submitting a total of 1,200 entries. This initiative serves as a platform for local photographers to showcase their talent and share the evolving culture and heritage of Saudi Arabia with a global audience.
news.headline: Saudi Arabia's Kingdom Photography Award showcases narratives blending tradition and modernity.

news.summary: Passengers will be required by the carrier to keep lithium batteries visible during use on flights for safety reasons. This measure aims to ensure a quicker response from flight crews in case of a fire. Keeping lithium batteries visible will help facilitate immediate action, enhancing overall passenger safety.
news.headline: Southwest Airlines to enhance portable battery rules; passengers must keep lithium batteries visible during flights for safety.

news.summary: A recent report revealed that the unemployment rate dropped to 4.8% in the latest month, with a total of 350,000 jobs added to the economy. This positive trend reflects a strong recovery following the economic downturn caused by the pandemic. Additionally, the report showed an increase in average hourly wages by 2.5% compared to last year. Experts attribute this growth to various government stimulus packages and increased consumer spending. Despite these improvements, concerns remain about the ongoing impact of COVID-19 on certain sectors of the economy.
news.headline: Government borrowing in the UK increases despite tax hikes by Rachel Reeves.
GOP support for businesses declining; companies should adapt to changing climate.

news.summary: The latest data shows that the unemployment rate in the country has reached 6.2%, a decrease from last month's 6.8%. This is the lowest it has been in the past year. Additionally, 250,000 new jobs were created last month. This positive trend is expected to continue in the upcoming months as businesses continue to recover from the effects of the pandemic. The decrease in the unemployment rate is seen as a sign of economic growth and stability in the country.
news.headline: OPEC+ mulls increasing output significantly in July.

news.summary: Sunlands Technology Group announced its financial results for Q1 2025 with net revenues of RMB487.6 million, reduced from RMB523.2 million in Q1 2024. Gross billings were RMB412.3 million, compared to RMB398.8 million in Q1 2024, and gross profit was RMB415.3 million, down from RMB446.1 million in the previous year. Net income decreased to RMB75.2 million from RMB112.7 million in Q1 2024. New student enrollments were 169,083, and deferred revenue stood at RMB891.6 million as of March 31, 2025. The company's management stated confidence in delivering sustained growth and reiterated their focus on core capabilities. Sunlands also saw a decrease in cost of revenues and operating expenses remained stable. Their outlook for Q2 2025 expects revenues between RMB500 million to RMB520 million. As of March 31, 2025, the company had cash of RMB596.2 million and short-term investments of RMB200.7 million compared to RMB507.2 million and RMB276.0 million respectively in December 2024. Share repurchase program details were also highlighted, reflecting Sunlands' commitment to financial management and shareholder value. The attributed link provides further details and financial breakdowns.
news.headline: Sunlands Technology Group's Q1 2025 financial results: Net revenues $67.2M, net income $10.4M, new student enrollments 169,083, deferred revenue $122.9M. CEO confident in sustained growth.

news.headline: INE Security partners with Abadnet Institute for Cybersecurity training in Saudi Arabia. Leading global in training and certifications.

news.summary: In Washington, Manchester City Football Club is leveraging data and analytics beyond the pitch to prioritize water sustainability. Teaming up with Xylem (NYSE: XYL), the club is enhancing its efforts by implementing digital solutions to optimize rainwater capture and reuse. Through the Xylem Vue digital water platform at City Football Academy, equipped with connected sensors and smart meters, the club gains real-time insights into water usage, emphasizing their dedication to environmental responsibility.
news.headline: Man City uses smart water tech by Xylem for sustainability, capturing and reusing rainwater efficiently. #LetsSolveWater

news.summary: Expro (NYSE: XPRO) has secured long-term Tubular Running Services (TRS) deals with two major operators in the Gulf of America, for deepwater drill ships and platform rigs. The contracts, worth $80 million, feature Expro’s cutting-edge technologies, including the award-winning Centri-FITM platform. Centri-FITM, recognized with the E&P Special Meritorious award, acts as the operational center, aimed at enhancing operational efficiencies.
news.headline: Expro wins $80M TRS contracts with Super-Majors in Gulf of America, utilizing advanced Centri-FITM platform technology.

news.summary: A new global challenge called the Good Start Challenge has been launched with €2.6 million in funding. The initiative aims to establish smart 'parent pods' in central community areas like markets or parks worldwide. The pods are designed to provide parents with a safe and convenient space.
news.headline: €2.6M innovation challenge in Sub-Saharan Africa seeks to create 'parent pods' for new parents in community spaces.

news.summary: A recent report by Datamaran delves into over 11,000 Impact, Risk, and Opportunity (IRO) statements, shedding light on companies' approaches to CSRD compliance and sustainability priorities. The analysis was conducted in New York and London on May 22, 2025 by Datamaran, a prominent player in AI-driven risk assessment.
news.headline: Datamaran study reviews 11,000+ IRO statements from 300 European companies on CSRD compliance and sustainability priorities.
